parameters.functionCode: const p = $input.first().json;\nreturn [{ json: { channel: p.channel, message_id: p.message_id, sender_id: p.sender_id, text: p.text, hash: p.hash } }];

meta.description: InitCore v1.0 — Adapter Telegram Bot API. Valida X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token, extrae message.from/text/photo/document/voice/video y llama al workflow core_normalization con reintentos exponenciales (3 intentos).
